name: Semradr
desc: A decision intelligence layer for creators and teams. The hardest part of creating isn't the idea — it's the signal-to-noise problem. Semradr doesn't add more data. It tells you what the data means — and what to do about it.

name: Aegis
desc: AI agent evaluation harness — sandboxed execution, live LLM proxying, and CI-native reporting. Wrap your agent in a full eval suite. Ship with confidence because you measured it.

name: LogHaven
desc: Local-first observability for onchain and off-chain systems. One agent. Any chain. Full control. No ingestion fees, no vendor lock-in, no surprises.

name: PDF Knife
desc: Browser extension that automatically downloads PDFs the moment they open. No clicks, no friction, no losing the tab.

name: Onyeego
desc: Mobile app for safely tracking and organizing micro-transactions. Built for the everyday reality of informal finance. Coming to PlayStore and AppStore.

name: Bolt
desc: Run Linux commands natively from a Windows command prompt. For the developer stuck on Windows who doesn't want to give up their Linux muscle memory.

name: Fluid Sim
desc: Fluid dynamics simulation in Python. An exploration of Navier-Stokes equations through code — where physics becomes something you can run, visualize, and break.

name: Dom Explorer
desc: Domain security insight tool. Point it at a domain and understand what's really going on underneath — DNS records, exposure, security posture.

name: Rentn
desc: Find your ideal rental home in a few clicks. The housing search experience, rebuilt from scratch without the noise.

name: Scrapper
desc: Web scraper and JSON parser built to harvest and structure large NFT datasets. An exercise in data pipeline engineering at scale.
